title: prehistoric park The Great Adventure
description: try to recrate prehistoric park with the tool you have been given
body: Our planet holds millions of species, but 99% of them are extinct.  What if we can bring them back with methods like time travel?  How about building a zoo of these ancient lost organisms to educate others about the bygone past?  Build your own prehistoric park, uncover what lies in the fossil record all of those eons ago and recreate them with the machines and do you dare to create a park with these fossil flora and fauna?
